target_rows.desired_shift: basis_advantage_bps should no longer collapse to one saturated value.
target_rows.rationale: The current carry rows both saturate the basis component. The next refresh should add rows that create non-maximal basis values.

target_rows.desired_shift: challenger_carry_days should vary beyond the current constant +1 day.
target_rows.rationale: The current pilot cannot learn whether carry is robust when duration is shorter or longer than the current shared row shape.

target_rows.desired_shift: same_exit_date should not remain uniformly true across all carry rows.
target_rows.rationale: A rankable pilot needs evidence beyond the current perfect same-exit alignment pattern.

target_rows.desired_shift: carry rows should appear outside the current theme_q4 / 300750 evidence island.
target_rows.rationale: The next refresh should expand carry evidence beyond one dataset-slice-symbol cluster before any wider factor work opens.

interpretation: The next refresh batch should not be justified as generic sample growth; it should be justified as targeted factor-row diversity expansion.
The carry lane is currently bottlenecked by saturated basis values, constant carry duration, and perfect same-exit alignment.
So the next batch should be designed to break those constants before any second factor lane is opened.
